level_signals: JD explicitly welcomes candidates without 'the right job title'
Emphasis on fast learning and resourcefulness over prior experience
No years of experience requirement stated

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Independent Operator: You can take a goal, design a plan, and execute with minimal oversight.
Creative, Fast Learner: You spot opportunities and figure out new skills fast.
Resourceful: Obstacles are rarely a hindrance. You know how to improvise, learn, and push through.
Mission-Aligned: You genuinely care about building better, more human customer experiences with AI.
Organized & Detail-Oriented: You keep yourself on track and deliver what you promise.
Run Performance Marketing: Own the strategy, execution, and ongoing optimization for paid channels, such as Google, Meta, and LinkedIn.
Drive SEO: Research, plan, and execute SEO tactics to move Bland up search rankings with a secondary focus on optimizing our presence on Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT, and other AI platforms.
Own Content for Key Pages: Write and launch use case, case study, and GTM content on our site.
Social & Content Development: Draft creatives, schedule, and experiment with content across our social and site channels. You would be hands-on with ideating, writing, and executing.
Campaign Management: Track, report, and analyze all marketing campaigns. Measure KPIs, iterate, and communicate results clearly across the organization.
Brand & Messaging: Shape how Bland AI shows up in the world across every digital or real-world experience. You'll make sure our messaging is creative, thoughtful, and memorable.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Track Record of Growth: You've grown a social media account, newsletter, website, or project to a meaningful audience.
Hands-On Experience: You've built or managed websites, made content, or run campaigns.
Deep Conviction: You believe you can execute at a high level, even if you haven't had the 'right' job title before.

scope.surface: Growth marketing — paid channels, SEO, content, social, brand, campaign management
scope.business_model: B2B SaaS / enterprise AI phone agents
core_responsibilities: Own strategy, execution, and optimization for paid channels (Google, Meta, LinkedIn)
Research, plan, and execute SEO tactics including AI platform presence optimization
Write and launch use case, case study, and GTM content
Draft, schedule, and experiment with social and site content
Track, report, and analyze marketing campaigns; measure and communicate KPIs
Shape brand and messaging across digital and real-world experiences
Lead special marketing initiatives including product launches and awareness campaigns

green_flags: Series B startup with $65M raised from notable investors (Emergence Capital, Scale Venture Partners, Y Combinator, PayPal and Twilio founders)
Explicitly welcomes candidates without traditional job titles or extensive prior experience
High ownership and autonomy emphasized — good signal for growth-minded candidates
Named enterprise customers (Clipboard Health, Better.com) signal product-market fit
Encourages ambitious candidates who are fast learners to apply even if they feel underqualified
red_flags: Compensation described only as 'competitive base + meaningful equity + benefits' — no numbers disclosed
No years of experience or specific skill requirements make the bar ambiguous
Fully in-person role in San Francisco (Jackson Square) — no remote option
Visa sponsorship not mentioned at all
Role title 'Coordinator' but scope covers strategy ownership across multiple channels — possible title/scope mismatch

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title 'Coordinator' and JD language welcoming candidates without prior job titles)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly listed)
location.remote_us_eligible (inferred from 'in-person, high-ownership role' language and office description)
ambiguities: Must-Have Qualities section lists traits (independent, creative, resourceful, mission-aligned, organized) that read as cultural fit criteria rather than verifiable hard skills — classified as hard severity per JD section heading 'Must-Have Qualities' but are inherently soft/cultural in nature
The JD under 'Ambition is the Most Important Quality' effectively softens all requirements, making the hard/soft boundary blurry throughout
No explicit years of experience requirement, making seniority level ambiguous — treated as junior-to-mid based on title and welcoming language
